creator: hodong@nimfsoft.art
text:
(In reply to Hans Petter Selasky from comment #26)

I have the same problem after applying the patch (226420) to 13.0-RELEASE-p3.

% cat /boot/loader.conf
kern.geom.label.disk_ident.enable="0"
kern.geom.label.gptid.enable="0"
cryptodev_load="YES"
zfs_load="YES"
hw.usb.xhci.msi=0
hw.usb.xhci.msix=0
